DEFENDANT GOLDEN STATE LUMBER, INC'S Motion To Transfer Venue

Granted, no opposition filed. The case is transferred to San Mateo County. Pursuant to the parties' stipulation, counsel for defendant shall remit the transfer fees.

Order is signed.
